item.title: Surface Hydroxyl Groups Boost Catalytic Activity and Stability of PdAu Nanoalloy in Ullmann Homocoupling
item.description:
Publication date: August 2026

Source: Journal of Catalysis, Volume 460

Author(s): Yiping Zhou, Fang Gu, Luyao Li, Yuqi Zuo, Mengjiao Li, Guoyi Bai, Xin Wen

item.title: Isobutanol Dehydration Catalyzed by Bridging OH Groups at the (100) Surface of Ferrierite: From Static DFT to Machine Learning Accelerated Molecular Dynamics
item.description:
Publication date: Available online 20 June 2026

Source: Journal of Catalysis

Author(s): Katarína Skladanová, Monika Gešvandtnerová, Emeline Sola, Céline Chizallet, Thomas Pigeon, Michael Badawi, Tomáš Bučko
